404.heading: Oops! This is awkward
404.message: The page you're looking for could not be found

admin.alert_log_successful_publish_help: Emit a log message upon successful publishing of the alert to the destination, instead of only emitting logs when issues are encountered. Aids in debugging missing alerts, or making alert publishing auditable.
admin.alert_schedule_skip_publish_if_unchanged: Do not send an alert if nothing has changed since the last time the alert was sent.
admin.alert_schedule_summary_warning: The alert must be limited to one or more projects in order for summaries to work. When selecting projects to limit the alert to, consider that choosing too many projects can cause summaries to grow too large for certain destinations, leading to them being rejected.
admin.api_key_created_tooltip: When the API Key was created
admin.api_key_last_used_tooltip: Approximate last usage of the API Key
admin.bom_formats_desc: Enables support for processing BOMs of various formats. Only BOM formats which are enabled will be processed.
admin.change_password_next_login: User must change password at next login
admin.confirm_secret_deletion_message: Are you sure you want to delete the secret {name}?
admin.create_secret_description_placeholder: What is the secret used for?
admin.create_secret_name_placeholder: Enter a unique name for the secret
admin.create_secret_value_placeholder: Enter the value of the secret
admin.default_language_desc: Default language, which is used for everyone, when they didn't specify one. Language from Browser will be used, when this is disabled.
admin.enable_risk_score_history_check: Recalculate risk score weighting on project history
admin.extension_no_config: This extension does not support configuration.
admin.filter_expression_help: Notifications are only dispatched when the expression evaluates to true.
admin.filter_expression_help_fail_open: If evaluation fails, the notification will be sent regardless.
admin.filter_expression_var_subject: Notification subject (structure varies by event type)
admin.internal_component_desc:
Internal components will be excluded from vulnerability scans and version checks that rely on external systems.
 Note that the regular expressions below must be compliant with Java's regex syntax.
The regex must match the whole string. To match all namespaces with 'example' in it, write '.*example.*'.
admin.internal_identification_error: An error occurred queueing internal component identification. Check server logs for details
admin.label: Label
admin.maintenance_destructive_confirm_message: You are enabling settings that may permanently delete data. This cannot be undone. Are you sure?
admin.metrics_retention_help: How long to retain historical metrics data. Older data will be permanently deleted during maintenance.
admin.name_regex_desc: Specifies a regular expression that identifies internal components by the components name.
admin.namespace_regex_desc: Specifies a regular expression that identifies internal components by namespace. The namespace is often referred to as 'group', 'organization', or 'vendor' in various ecosystems.
admin.new_api_key: This is the newly generated API key. Please note that it will only be displayed once and cannot be retrieved later.
admin.old_key_format: This API key is outdated and should be updated soon for continued functionality!
admin.project_retention_days_help: Projects that have been inactive for longer than this period will be deleted.
admin.project_retention_enable_help: When enabled, inactive projects will be automatically deleted during maintenance based on the configured retention policy.
admin.project_retention_type_help: Determine whether to delete projects based on their age or the number of inactive versions.
admin.project_retention_versions_help: Only the specified number of most recently inactivated versions will be kept. Older inactive versions will be deleted.
admin.regenerate_api_key: This is the regenerated API key. Please note that it will only be displayed once and cannot be retrieved later.
admin.required_confirmPassword: Password confirmation is required and passwords must match
admin.risk_score_description: Dependency Track calculates the risk score of each project as a weighted severity score using the following calculation as default:
admin.risk_score_weighting_description: You can customize the weighting of each severity to customize the risk score.
admin.secret_not_found_message: The selected secret does not exist
admin.secret_reference_field: This field references a managed secret
admin.secret_reference_field_tooltip: This field references a managed secret. Pick an existing secret from the selector.
admin.tags_delete_unused_help: When enabled, tags that are not assigned to any entity will be automatically deleted during maintenance.
admin.test_notification_queued: A test notification has been queued
admin.update_secret_description_placeholder: Enter a new description, or leave empty to keep the existing one.
admin.update_secret_value_placeholder: Enter a new value, or leave empty to keep the existing one.
admin.welcome_message_desc: Customize the welcome message that appears on the start page of Dependency-Track before users sign in.

condition.unsuccessful_action: Could not perform the requested action

message.add_version_includes_help: Choose what data to carry over to the new version.
message.age_tooltip: Age in ISO-8601 period format (e.g. P1Y = 1 Year; P2Y3M = 2 Years, 3 Months)
message.analysis_details_tooltip: Details (explanation, workaround details, and other impact information)
message.analysis_tooltip: The current state of an occurrence of a vulnerability
message.apply_vex_tooltip: Apply analyses from a Vulnerability Exploitability eXchange (VEX) document to this project.
message.author: Author
message.collection_logic_metrics_by_aggregate_di: Metrics of collection project are calculated by aggregating numbers of all direct children.
Metrics of collection project are calculated by aggregating numbers of direct children with tag '{tag}'.
message.collection_logic_metrics_by_aggregate_la: Metrics of collection project are calculated by aggregating numbers of latest versions of direct children.
message.component_classification_desc: Classifies whether a component is considered internal or external to an organization
message.component_classifier_desc: Specifies the type of component: Assets (applications, operating systems, and hardware) and non-assets (libraries, frameworks, and files)
message.component_cpe_desc: The CPE v2.2 or v2.3 URI as provided by MITRE or NIST. All assets (applications, operating systems, and hardware) should have a CPE specified
message.component_download_partial: Component list could not be fully downloaded; the file contains partial data.
message.component_filename_desc: Specifies the observed filename of the component
message.component_group_desc: The suppliers higher-level namespace, group, or vendor identifier
message.component_hash_desc: Specifies the observed hash value of the component using the preceding algorithm
message.component_identifier_desc: Identifies the component by Package URL (PURL) or CPE. If the version type is 'Exact', the PURL or CPE must contain the version. If a range is specified, version information in the identifier will be ignored.
message.component_license_expression_desc: Specifies license information for the component in the form of an SPDX expression
message.component_license_url_desc: Specifies the URL to the license of the component
message.component_name_desc: The name of the component as provided by the supplier
message.component_package_url_desc: A Valid Package URL is required for libraries and frameworks. PURL syntax: pkg:type/namespace/name@version?qualifiers#subpath
message.component_spdx_license_desc: Specifies the SPDX license ID of the component
message.component_supplier_name_desc: The organization that supplied the component
message.component_swid_tagid_desc: The ISO/IEC 19770-2:2015 (SWID) tag ID provided by the software vendor
message.component_team_desc: Select the team assigned to this project
message.component_version_desc: The version of the component as provided by the supplier
message.coordinates_version_tooltip: You can use the comparison operators >, <, >=, <=, == and != to match specific versions or version ranges
message.export_vdr_tooltip: Export a Vulnerability Disclosure Report (VDR), as defined in NIST SP 800-161.
message.export_vex_tooltip: Export a Vulnerability Exploitability eXchange (VEX) document.

hash_verification.failed_explanation: At least one hash recorded for the component does not match the corresponding hash of the artifact resolved from the repository. The component may have been tampered with, or it does not actually originate from the resolved repository.
hash_verification.no_common_algorithm: The component and the repository artifact have no hash algorithms in common, so verification could not be performed.
hash_verification.no_component_hash_explanation: The component has no recorded hashes, so verification could not be performed.
hash_verification.no_repository_hash_explanation: No repository hashes are available for this component, so verification could not be performed.
hash_verification.passed_explanation: Every shared hash algorithm produced identical values for the component and the artifact resolved from the repository, indicating that the component matches what the repository published.

message.inactive_active_children: The project cannot be set to inactive if it has active children
message.is_latest_tooltip: Marks this version as the latest release of the project
message.justification_tooltip: The rationale of why the impact analysis state was asserted to be "Not Affected"
message.license_id_desc: The SPDX defined ID of the license. The ID may only contain alpha, numeric, and specific symbols: _ - . +
message.license_name_desc: The name of the license as provided by the supplier
message.login_forbidden: This account is inactive or has been suspended
message.login_permission_required: Login succeeded, but you don’t seem to have any permissions yet. Please contact your administrators for help.
message.manufacturer_name_desc: The organization that manufactured the component that the project describes
message.metric_refresh_requested: A refresh has been requested. Metrics will be updated when the refresh task has completed.
message.name: Name
message.not_found_in_dependency_graph: Dependency could not be found in dependency graph
message.object_identifier_desc: A unique identifier (UUID) that Dependency-Track automatically assigns to every object
message.occurrences_none_hint: Either no occurrences identified, or the tool that generated the BOM does not provide occurrence data.
message.oidc_availability_check_failed: Failed to determine availability of OpenID Connect
message.oidc_redirect_failed: An error occurred while redirecting to the OpenID Connect identity provider
message.only_direct_tooltip: Only show direct dependencies, hiding transitive dependencies
message.only_outdated_tooltip: Only show dependencies that have newer stable versions available
message.operator_help: ANY = any condition matches; ALL = every condition must match
message.password_force_change_desc: You need to change your password
message.password_not_acceptable: Check that new password and confirm password match. You can't re-use your old password
message.password_unauthorized: Check current login credentials and try again
message.policy_bundle_delete_confirm: Deleting this bundle will remove all policies it manages. Are you sure?
message.policy_bundle_managed_readonly: This policy is managed by a bundle and cannot be edited
message.policy_bundle_sync_requested: Policy bundle synchronization requested. Vulnerability policy data will be updated when the sync is completed.
message.policy_condition_hint: The condition determines when a policy applies. Use templates for common patterns.
message.policy_delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this policy?
message.policy_expression_cel_hint: Expressions use the Common Expression Language (CEL).
message.policy_is_only_for_latest_project_versio: Limit to project versions marked as latest
message.policy_justification_not_applicable: Justification is only applicable when state is Not Affected.
message.policy_name_conflict: A policy with this name already exists
message.policy_ratings_empty: No rating overrides configured. Original vulnerability ratings will be preserved.
message.policy_ratings_hint: Ratings defined here will override existing vulnerability ratings when the policy is applied.
message.policy_unsaved_changes: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to leave?
message.policy_validation_date_range: Valid until date must be after valid from date
message.policy_validation_rating_incomplete: Each rating must have a method and severity
message.policy_warn_suppress_exploitable: Warning: Suppressing findings marked as exploitable may hide active security risks.
message.project_add_collection_tag: Aggregate data of children with this tag
message.project_collection_logic_desc: Specifies if this project is a collection project and which metrics calculation logic to apply for a collection project. Collection projects do not have own components but display data of their children using one of the available logics.
message.project_collection_logic_latest_version_: Aggregate direct children marked as latest
message.project_delete_message: Deleting this project will also permanently delete all associated child projects. This action cannot be undone. Are you sure you want to proceed?
message.project_metadata_supplier_name_desc: The organization that supplied the BOM
message.project_name_desc: The name of the project or component as provided by the supplier
message.project_reanalyze_requested: A Project Vulnerability Analysis has been requested. Project vulnerability data will be updated when the reanalysis task has completed.
message.project_reanalyze_tooltip: Runs configured analyzers to detect vulnerabilities in this project's components. Will use any cached results that haven't expired yet
message.project_supplier_name_desc: The organization that supplied the component that the project describes
message.project_version_conflict: A project with version “{version}” already exists.
message.record_unchanged_message: Record did not change and remains unmodified
message.required_team: At least one team must be selected
message.required_vulnerability_vuln_id: A unique vulnerability identifier is required
message.response_tooltip: A response to the vulnerability by the manufacturer, supplier, or project responsible for the affected component or service
message.save_changes_first: Save or discard your unsaved changes first
message.service_name_desc: The name of the service as described by the provider
message.service_version_desc: The version of the service as described by the provider
message.subtitle: Subtitle
message.table_sort_preference_reset: Sorting by "{field}" is no longer supported. Stored preferences cleared. Reload to apply.
message.title: Title
message.upload_bom_tooltip: Upload BOM, all components will be analyzed for vulnerabilities
message.version_distance_tooltip: Specify the difference between version numbers, or empty to ignore
message.violation_state_help: Severity assigned when this policy is violated
message.vulnerability_created_desc: The date the vulnerability record was originally created
message.vulnerability_published_desc: The date the vulnerability record was originally published
message.vulnerability_rejected_desc: The date the vulnerability record was rejected / withdrawn by its source
message.vulnerability_title_desc: The optional title of the vulnerability
message.vulnerability_updated_desc: The date the vulnerability record was last updated
message.vulnerability_vuln_id_desc: The identifier which uniquely identifies this vulnerability within the same source

severity.derive_from_cvss_or_owasp_rr: Derive from CVSS or OWASP RR
